name: socialforge
description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation with asset-first compositing. Parse calendars, match brand assets, generate AI-composed creative, render carousels, adapt copy, produce review galleries. Multi-brand, multi-platform. v1.5 ships zero global hooks for clean multi-plugin coexistence — credential status now via /sf:status on demand. v1.5.1 hardened the plugin manifest with homepage, repository, and license fields. v1.5.2 fixes the plugin manifest format so install works (repository as string, $schema removed). All 10 HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible.
